title: Most and least shorted industrial stocks with up to $2B market cap
content:
Short interest at the end of February was spread broadly across the industrial sector, with no single industry emerging as a clear standout or dominating in terms of positioning.

HERE ARE THE FIVE MOST SHORTED INDUSTRIAL STOCKS WITH MARKET CAPITALIZATIONS OF UP TO $2 BILLION (AS A % OF SHARES OUTSTANDING) 

Enovix (ENVX [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/ENVX]), Short Interest: 28.12%.

Richtech Robotics (RR [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/RR]), Short Interest: 26.67%.

NANO Nuclear Energy (NNE [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/NNE]), Short Interest: 25.18%.

3D Systems (DDD [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/DDD]), Short Interest: 24.44%.

Virgin Galactic Holdings (SPCE [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/SPCE]), Short Interest: 23.28%.

HERE ARE THE FIVE LEAST SHORTED INDUSTRIAL STOCKS WITH MARKET CAPITALIZATIONS OF UP TO $2 BILLION: (AS A % OF SHARES OUTSTANDING)

WF International (WXM [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/WXM]), Short Interest: 0.50%.

Texxon Holding (NPT [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/NPT]), Short Interest: 0.51%.

Bridger Aerospace Group Holdings (BAER [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/BAER]), Short Interest: 0.52%.

Globavend Holdings (GVH [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/GVH]), Short Interest: 0.53%.

Highway Holdings (HIHO [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/HIHO]), Short Interest: 0.54%.
